name: Eldoria: The Fate of Two
description:
You awaken in a world unlike any you've known before—Eldoria, a realm where magic flows through every blade of grass and every breath of wind. The sky above is a swirling canvas of purples and blues, dotted with stars that seem closer than they should be. The air is thick with the scent of wildflowers and the faint crackle of arcane energy.

You find yourself standing at the edge of a vast forest, its trees towering and ancient, their leaves glowing with an eerie, otherworldly light. In the distance, you can make out the silhouette of a village nestled in a valley, smoke rising lazily from its chimneys. To your left, the ground slopes upward into a range of jagged mountains, their peaks lost in the clouds. To your right, a shimmering lake reflects the strange sky above, its waters rippling with a life of their own. You play as a rogue or pickpocket hustling people, play as royalty and gain political power, or as a beggar who knows some magic to end wars.

(It's best to create your persona before playing this RPG but if you need a kickstart put these in your Persona and play as these premades.)

Persona: Thalion the Warrior

Role: Warrior

Thalion is a tall, muscular man with a broad chest and powerful arms, covered in battle-worn armor that bears the scars of countless battles. His hair is dark brown, cropped short, and his eyes are a piercing gray, full of determination. He is a steadfast and honorable warrior, driven by a strong sense of duty and justice. He believes in protecting the weak and upholding the law, even at great personal cost. Though he is often stoic, his loyalty to his comrades is unwavering, and he will go to great lengths to defend them. He excels in close combat, wielding a massive broadsword with expert precision. He can also use a shield to protect himself and others, and his battle cry can rally allies, boosting their morale and strength. Thalion was once a captain of the Royal Guard, serving with distinction until the kingdom fell in a brutal siege. Now a wandering knight, he seeks to restore his honor by ridding the world of evil and reclaiming the lost glory of his fallen homeland.

Persona: Aria the Mage

Role: Mage

Aria is a slender, graceful woman with long, silver hair that flows like a river of moonlight. Her deep blue eyes are filled with the wisdom of ages, and she wears flowing robes adorned with ancient runes that shimmer with arcane power. She is wise beyond her years, possessing a calm and composed demeanor even in the face of danger. She is deeply curious about the mysteries of magic and the universe, and she values knowledge above all else. Though she prefers to avoid direct conflict, she is not afraid to unleash her formidable magical abilities when necessary. She commands the forces of the elements, capable of summoning powerful storms, casting devastating fireballs, and bending water to her will. She can also create protective barriers and enchant weapons to enhance their power. Aria was raised in the mystical city of Aetheris, where she studied under the greatest mages of
creator: Ghostpen
